title: Add items to cart and place an order
description: Verifies a customer can add menu items, review the cart, add notes, and complete checkout with an order confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu/1
Add a menu item to the cart
Open the cart
Add special notes to the order
Place the order
Verify an order confirmation is visible
Verify the cart is cleared

title: Complete shop registration and setup
description: Verifies an owner can create a new shop account, submit the setup form, and reach the completed shop setup state.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the shop name with a unique valid value
Fill in the owner name with a valid value
Fill in the mobile field with a valid value
Fill in the address field with a valid value
Select a valid logo image file
Submit the shop creation form
Verify the shop setup complete state is displayed

title: Open a customer menu from a QR shop link
description: Verifies a customer can open the QR-based menu page for a shop and see the menu experience load.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu/1
Verify the shop menu is displayed
Verify menu categories are displayed

title: Advance an order through all kitchen stages
description: Kitchen staff can move a single order from accepted to preparing to ready and see the final status reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the credentials field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /orders
Select an active order card
Mark the selected order as accepted
Mark the selected order as preparing
Mark the selected order as ready
Verify the order status is displayed as ready
Verify the order card shows the updated final status

title: Call a waiter from the menu
description: Verifies a customer can request service from the menu and see a confirmation that the request was sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu/1
Click the call waiter control
Verify a service request confirmation is visible

title: View active kitchen orders
description: Kitchen staff can open the orders page and see the current active orders list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the credentials field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /orders
Verify the active orders list is displayed
Verify at least one order card is displayed when orders exist

title: Remove an item before checkout
description: Verifies a customer can review the cart, remove an item, and leave the cart in the expected reduced state before placing an order.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu/1
Add a menu item to the cart
Add another menu item to the cart
Open the cart
Remove one item from the cart
Verify the cart shows one fewer item
Verify the remaining cart items are displayed

title: Filter the menu by category
description: Verifies a customer can switch to a category and see the menu items update to match that category.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu/1
Select a menu category
Verify the displayed items match the selected category

title: Skip directly to preparing on an order
description: Kitchen staff can update an order straight to preparing and see the change reflected on the order card.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the credentials field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /orders
Select an active order card
Mark the selected order as preparing
Verify the order status is displayed as preparing
Verify the order card reflects the updated preparing status

title: Search the menu for matching items
description: Verifies a customer can search the menu and see matching items in the results.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu/1
Search for a menu item using a valid keyword
Verify matching menu items are displayed

title: Keep multiple active orders visible
description: Kitchen staff can view more than one active order at the same time on the orders page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the credentials field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /orders
Verify multiple active order cards are displayed when several orders exist

title: Show validation for incomplete shop registration
description: Verifies the registration form prevents submission and shows validation feedback when required shop details are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the shop name with a valid value
Submit the shop creation form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the shop setup complete state is not displayed

title: Reject an invalid shop logo upload type
description: Verifies the shop registration flow blocks an unsupported logo file and keeps the form from completing.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the shop name with a unique valid value
Fill in the owner name with a valid value
Fill in the mobile field with a valid value
Fill in the address field with a valid value
Select an unsupported logo file
Submit the shop creation form
Verify a file validation error is visible
Verify the shop setup complete state is not displayed

title: Show an empty orders state
description: Kitchen staff see an empty state when there are no active orders to manage.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the credentials field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /orders
Verify an empty state message is displayed for active orders

title: Show validation for an invalid order note
description: Verifies the order flow shows validation feedback when the customer enters an invalid note and does not proceed to confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu/1
Add a menu item to the cart
Open the cart
Fill the notes field with an overly long special request
Place the order
Verify an order note validation error is visible
Verify an order confirmation is not visible
